overall.description: A cinematic view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game (likely Hogwarts Legacy), showcasing the iconic floating candles illuminating long dining tables filled with students. The gothic stone architecture features tall stained glass windows emitting cool blue evening light, contrasting with the warm candlelight. The camera remains stationary near the entrance, observing the scene from behind two characters in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: standing at the entrance with a companion, observing the great hall and students dining below

notable_agents.action: companion character in dark robes standing to the left, looking into the hall
students seated at long house tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the hall from above
cluster of floating candles near the left wall
cluster of floating candles near the right windows
long wooden house tables arranged in rows running the length of the hall, covered with food and place settings
tall gothic arched stained glass windows emitting cool blue evening light
large stone fireplace with fire burning on the far left wall
stone balcony or gallery level on the left wall above the fireplace
polished stone floor tiles reflecting the candlelight

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of the Great Hall from the entrance, looking down the central aisle toward the far end. Hundreds of floating candles provide warm illumination above long dining tables where students are seated. Gothic stone architecture surrounds the space with tall stained glass windows on the right showing the night sky. Two characters stand in the foreground observing the scene, while the stone fireplace burns on the far left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze into the Great Hall, capturing the contrast between the warm interior glow and the cool evening light. It begins at the entrance, looking down the central aisle where hundreds of floating candles cast a golden light over long dining tables filled with students. As the eye travels deeper into the space, the gothic stone architecture reveals tall stained glass windows on the right that emit a soft blue light from the night sky. The perspective remains anchored behind two characters in the foreground, while the scene extends toward the far end of the hall and a burning stone fireplace on the left wall.
